name: Miasto i gwiazdy Arthur C Clarke strona 1

words.hint: Miasto lśniło niczym klejnot na piersi pustyni.
words.answer: The city shone like a jewel upon the breast of the desert.

words.hint: Zmiana i przemiana były kiedyś jego częścią.
words.answer: Change and alteration were once part of it.
Time passed it by indifferently.

words.hint: Ciemność nigdy nie nadchodziła w jego ulicach.
words.answer: Darkness never came to its streets.

words.hint: Miasto nie znało ani ciepła, ani zimna.
words.answer: The city knew neither heat nor cold.
It was a universe unto itself.

words.hint: Nigdy wcześniej nie zbudowano takiego miasta.
words.answer: Never before had such a city been built.
Time had swept away even their names.
Diaspar had challenged eternity.

words.hint: Była to ostatnia twierdza rasy, która rządziła tysiącem światów.
words.answer: It was the last citadel of a race that had ruled a thousand worlds.
It could not withstand the erosion of time.
It preserved itself, but lost its soul.
The desert had encompassed the entire globe.
The hand of man had been withdrawn.
The planet was dying.

words.hint: Oceany odpłynęły, nie niosąc już swojego ciężaru.
words.answer: The oceans had ebbed away, bearing their burden no more.
The air could not hold Earth’s warmth.

words.hint: Mogło zniszczyć góry, ale nie przynosiło zimna do Diasparu.
words.answer: It could crumble mountains, but would not bring chill to Diaspar.
Diaspar had defeated the weariness of the world.

words.hint: Pył wieków nie dotarł do jego ulic.
words.answer: The dust of ages had not entered its streets.
The city remained unchanged through eons.
It was isolated from the rest of the world.
It knew no contact with the outside.
It was the last bastion of humanity.

words.hint: Czas nie miał już nad nim władzy.
words.answer: Time no longer held sway over it.
It was designed to endure forever.

words.hint: Ziemia mogła się rozsypać, ale miasto przetrwa.
words.answer: Earth could crumble, but the city would endure.

words.hint: Było odporne na rozpad i korozję.
words.answer: It was resistant to decay and corrosion.

words.hint: Ludzie zapomnieli wiele, nie zdając sobie z tego sprawy.
words.answer: People had forgotten much, without realizing it.

words.hint: Ich środowisko było idealnie dopasowane do nich.
words.answer: Their environment was perfectly suited to them.

words.hint: To, co było poza murami, nie miało znaczenia.
words.answer: What lay beyond the walls did not matter.

words.hint: Zostało to wykluczone z ich świadomości.
words.answer: It had been shut out of their minds.
Diaspar was all they knew.
The city was like a time capsule.
Eternity was its destiny.

words.hint: Nie znało cyklu narodzin i śmierci.
words.answer: It knew no cycle of birth and death.

words.hint: Było zamknięte w sobie, jakby odcięte od historii.
words.answer: It was self-contained, as if cut off from history.

words.hint: Czas nie zostawił na nim śladu.
words.answer: Time left no mark upon it.
It was impervious to destruction.
Built with eternity in mind.
It knew no transience.
It was the last witness of ancient glory.

words.hint: Ziemia była zbyt zmęczona, by stworzyć coś nowego.
words.answer: Earth was too weary to create anything new.

words.hint: Miasto trwało, gdy wszystko inne zniknęło.
words.answer: The city endured when all else had vanished.
It was a monument to human ambition.
It knew neither morning nor dusk.

words.hint: Czas był dla niego tylko wspomnieniem.
words.answer: Time was only a memory to it.

words.hint: Było jak sen, który nigdy się nie kończy.
words.answer: It was like a dream that never ended.

words.hint: Zbudowane z myślą o przetrwaniu wszystkiego.
words.answer: Built to survive everything.
